CREATE TABLE test_char_length (id INT PRIMARY KEY, text_col TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_char_length VALUES (1, R'2€');
INSERT INTO test_char_length VALUES (2, R'こんにちは');
INSERT INTO test_char_length VALUES (3, R'Привет');
INSERT INTO test_char_length VALUES (4, R'🌍');
INSERT INTO test_char_length VALUES (5, R'Hello World!');
SELECT char_length(text_col) FROM test_char_length WHERE id = 1;
SELECT char_length(text_col) FROM test_char_length WHERE id = 2;
SELECT char_length(text_col) FROM test_char_length WHERE id = 3;
SELECT char_length(text_col) FROM test_char_length WHERE id = 4;
SELECT char_length(text_col) FROM test_char_length WHERE id = 5;
SELECT id, char_length(text_col) AS length FROM test_char_length;
SELECT AVG(char_length(text_col)) FROM test_char_length;
SELECT id, char_length(text_col) AS length FROM test_char_length WHERE char_length(text_col) > 4;
CREATE TABLE other_table (reference_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (reference_id) REFERENCES test_char_length(id));
INSERT INTO other_table VALUES (1), (3);
SELECT o.reference_id, c.char_length FROM other_table o JOIN test_char_length c ON o.reference_id = c.id;
SELECT c.id, char_length(c.text_col) FROM test_char_length c WHERE char_length(c.text_col) IN (SELECT char_length(text_col) FROM test_char_length WHERE id <= 3);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_char_length WHERE char_length(text_col) = 1;
SELECT id, char_length(text_col) AS length FROM test_char_length ORDER BY length DESC;
